title: No Citizenship for Alien Invaders Act of 2025
short_title: No Citizenship for Alien Invaders Act of 2025
plain_summary: This bill would make a new rule that says anyone who came into the United States illegally can never become a US citizen later. Right now, some people who entered illegally might be able to become citizens through a process called naturalization if they meet certain requirements. This bill would stop that from happening completely. It means that even if other laws say someone could become a citizen, this rule would override those laws and keep them from ever getting citizenship.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.

sections.title: Section 1  Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the No Citizenship for Alien Invaders Act of twenty twenty five.

sections.title: Section 2  Ineligibility for Naturalization
sections.text: This section changes existing immigration law. It adds a new rule that says any foreign person who enters the United States without permission cannot become a United States citizen through naturalization (the legal process of becoming a citizen). This rule applies even if other immigration laws might allow them to become citizens.
